MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:

Plaintiff NASIR PATEL is present AND IN PRO PER.
Defendant ANTONIO CRISTOBAL TORRES, is present.
Attorney JASON GREEN-LOVE & BLAKE BOLTON, representing the defendant through limited scope & FULL SCOPE.

The Judge Pro Tem ORA PROCHOVNICK , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502A , for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle.

The trial date of MAY 16, 2011 remains on calendar.
